title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Paxel
description: This mod basically adds a new unbreakable netherite paxel that is a combination of 3 unbreakable tools
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f921d9ad5407c51f290d004083bb82d8957fd2a7.png)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Paxel
The Unbreakable Netherite Paxel is a combination of three unbreakable tools:

Unbreakable Netherite **Axe** - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/unbreakable-netherite-axe) [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-axe)

Unbreakable Netherite **Pickaxe** - [Modrinth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-pickaxe) [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-pickaxe)

Unbreakable Netherite **Shovel** - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-unbreakable-netherite-shovel) [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-shovel)

# Also the recipe for it:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c4d3a5e664349170d1d8c3d2e68aa3d1c94290.png)

**Curseforge Version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-paxel)
